body_txt: A supernatural creature that is diametrically opposite to the way its species usually functions/looks like (e.g. a wolf that turns into a human every full moon or a mermaid with the upper body of a fish and the legs of a human ). The name is often reversed (e.g. werewolf -> wolfwere) and it may be an Evil Counterpart / Good Counterpart or even My Species Doth Protest Too Much / Cultural Rebel to them as well. Compare Square Race, Round Class (the creature's occupation is at odds with its biology). May overlap with Benevolent Monsters if the supernatural creatures are depicted as friendly when they are traditionally malicious. Related to Vegetarian Vampire . Subtrope of Our Monsters Are Weird . See also Mix-and-Match Creatures and some cases of Half-Human Hybrid when the animal parts aren't where you'd expect them to be.
